_comment: sp_Blitz CheckID to maturity category/level mapping. Exported from DiagnosticsRoadmap CategoryLevelMap + sql-checks.json. Edit this file to reclassify findings — do NOT commit if it contains confidential server/org info.

blitzCheckMap.findingName: Full Recovery Model Without Log Backups
Multiple Log Files on One Drive
Uneven File Growth Settings in One Filegroup
SQL Agent Job Runs at Startup
The partitioned database may have non-aligned indexes
Transaction Log Larger than Data File

Backing Up to Same Drive Where Databases Reside
Infinite merge replication metadata retention period

SQL Server Version Out of Support

Delayed Durability Enabled, Accepted Data Loss Risk

Database Files on Network File Shares
